name: Online Filing for Machine Injury Claims

mainEntity.name: How to file machine injury claim with Utah Labor Commission online?
mainEntity.text: How to file machine injury claim with Utah Labor Commission online?

acceptedAnswer.text: Submit Employer's First Report via Division portal or mail; injured workers file disputes online at laborcommission.utah.gov.[2][4]

suggestedAnswer.text: Download form, detail machine specifics (e.g., model, malfunction). Division assists providers too. For disputes, use applicant portal. Holladay attorneys guide filings.[4][2]

description: Submit Employer's First Report via Division portal or mail; injured workers file disputes online at laborcommission.utah.gov.[2][4]
